ar.exchange.accepted_msg: Great news! {{name}} has accepted your exchange request. You can now coordinate when and where the service will take place.
ar.exchange.accepted_next_step: Message {{name}} to arrange when and where the service will happen.
ar.exchange.approved_msg: Great news! Your exchange has been approved by a coordinator. You can now begin the service exchange.
ar.exchange.approved_next_step: Contact the other party to arrange when and where the service will take place.
ar.exchange.completed_msg: Congratulations! Your exchange has been completed successfully. {{hours}} hour(s) have been transferred.
ar.exchange.completed_well_done: Your time credit balance has been updated. Consider leaving a review for the other member!
ar.exchange.disputed_msg: There's a discrepancy in the hours confirmed by both parties. A coordinator will review this exchange and help resolve the difference.
ar.exchange.disputed_under_review: A coordinator will review the confirmed hours and make a fair decision.
ar.exchange.pending_broker_msg: The provider has accepted your request! Before you can begin, a community coordinator needs to review and approve this exchange.
ar.exchange.pending_broker_why: Some exchanges require coordinator review to ensure safety and suitability for all members.
ar.exchange.ready_confirmation_action: Please confirm the hours as soon as possible so the other party receives their time credits.
ar.exchange.ready_confirmation_msg: The exchange has been marked as complete! Please confirm the number of hours worked so the time credits can be transferred.
ar.exchange.rejected_msg: A coordinator has reviewed this exchange and was unable to approve it at this time.
ar.exchange.request_declined_msg: Unfortunately, {{name}} has declined your exchange request.
ar.exchange.request_received_msg: {{name}} would like to exchange services with you! They've proposed {{hours}} hour(s) for this exchange.
ar.exchange.started_msg: The exchange is now in progress! The service is being provided.
ar.exchange.started_remember: When the service is complete, mark it as done and confirm the actual hours worked.
ar.hot_match.heading: Hot Match Found!
ar.match_approval.body: A new match is waiting for your approval:
ar.match_approval.heading: Match Needs Approval
ar.match_approval.review_note: Please review this match to ensure the member is suitable (mobility, health considerations) and the activity is within insurance coverage.
ar.match_approved.body: Great news! A coordinator has approved a match for you:
ar.match_approved.heading: You've Been Matched!
ar.match_approved.view_note: Click below to view the listing and get in touch with the member.
ar.match_digest.heading: Your {{period}} Match Digest
ar.match_rejected.body: Unfortunately, a coordinator has determined that the following match wasn't suitable at this time:
ar.match_rejected.encouragement: Don't worry - there are plenty of other opportunities in your community! Browse more matches to find a good fit.
ar.match_rejected.heading: Match Update
ar.mutual_match.heading: Mutual Match!
ar.review.review_body: {{reviewer}} has left you a review on :community.
ar.volunteering.application_received_body: {{name}} has applied to volunteer with your organisation.
ar.volunteering.application_received_note: Review their application and approve or decline from your organisation dashboard.
ar.volunteering.approved_body: Great news! Your volunteer application has been approved.
ar.volunteering.approved_next: You can now sign up for shifts and start logging your volunteer hours. Thank you for making a difference in your community!
ar.volunteering.declined_body: Unfortunately, your application was not accepted this time.
ar.volunteering.declined_encouragement: Don't be discouraged — there are many other volunteering opportunities available. Browse the latest openings and find the perfect fit for your skills.
ar.volunteering.hours_approved_body: Your volunteer hours with {{org}} have been verified and approved.
ar.volunteering.hours_approved_thanks: Thank you for your valuable contribution to the community!
ar.volunteering.hours_declined_body: Your {{hours}} volunteering log with {{org}} was not approved.
ar.volunteering.hours_declined_note: This may be due to a discrepancy in the hours recorded. If you believe this is an error, please contact the organisation directly to discuss.
ar.volunteering.hours_paid_body: Your volunteer hours have been approved and time credits have been added to your wallet!
ar.volunteering.hours_paid_detail: {{org}} has paid you {{hours}} time credits for your volunteering. You can spend these credits on services from other community members.

nl.exchange.accepted_next_step: Message {{name}} to arrange when and where the service will happen.
nl.exchange.approved_msg: Great news! Your exchange has been approved by a coordinator. You can now begin the service exchange.
nl.exchange.approved_next_step: Contact the other party to arrange when and where the service will take place.
nl.exchange.completed_msg: Congratulations! Your exchange has been completed successfully. {{hours}} hour(s) have been transferred.
nl.exchange.completed_well_done: Your time credit balance has been updated. Consider leaving a review for the other member!
nl.exchange.disputed_msg: There's a discrepancy in the hours confirmed by both parties. A coordinator will review this exchange and help resolve the difference.
nl.exchange.disputed_under_review: A coordinator will review the confirmed hours and make a fair decision.
nl.exchange.pending_broker_msg: The provider has accepted your request! Before you can begin, a community coordinator needs to review and approve this exchange.
nl.exchange.pending_broker_why: Some exchanges require coordinator review to ensure safety and suitability for all members.
nl.exchange.ready_confirmation_action: Please confirm the hours as soon as possible so the other party receives their time credits.
nl.exchange.ready_confirmation_msg: The exchange has been marked as complete! Please confirm the number of hours worked so the time credits can be transferred.
nl.exchange.rejected_msg: A coordinator has reviewed this exchange and was unable to approve it at this time.
nl.exchange.request_declined_msg: Unfortunately, {{name}} has declined your exchange request.
nl.exchange.request_received_msg: {{name}} would like to exchange services with you! They've proposed {{hours}} hour(s) for this exchange.
nl.exchange.started_msg: The exchange is now in progress! The service is being provided.
nl.exchange.started_remember: When the service is complete, mark it as done and confirm the actual hours worked.
nl.hot_match.heading: Hot Match Found!
nl.match_approval.body: A new match is waiting for your approval:
nl.match_approval.heading: Match Needs Approval
nl.match_approval.review_note: Please review this match to ensure the member is suitable (mobility, health considerations) and the activity is within insurance coverage.
nl.match_approved.body: Great news! A coordinator has approved a match for you:
nl.match_approved.heading: You've Been Matched!
nl.match_approved.view_note: Click below to view the listing and get in touch with the member.
nl.match_digest.heading: Your {{period}} Match Digest
nl.match_rejected.body: Unfortunately, a coordinator has determined that the following match wasn't suitable at this time:
nl.match_rejected.encouragement: Don't worry - there are plenty of other opportunities in your community! Browse more matches to find a good fit.
nl.match_rejected.heading: Match Update
nl.mutual_match.heading: Mutual Match!
nl.review.review_body: {{reviewer}} has left you a review on :community.
nl.volunteering.application_received_body: {{name}} has applied to volunteer with your organisation.
nl.volunteering.application_received_note: Review their application and approve or decline from your organisation dashboard.
nl.volunteering.approved_body: Great news! Your volunteer application has been approved.
nl.volunteering.approved_next: You can now sign up for shifts and start logging your volunteer hours. Thank you for making a difference in your community!
nl.volunteering.declined_body: Unfortunately, your application was not accepted this time.
nl.volunteering.declined_encouragement: Don't be discouraged — there are many other volunteering opportunities available. Browse the latest openings and find the perfect fit for your skills.
nl.volunteering.hours_approved_body: Your volunteer hours with {{org}} have been verified and approved.
nl.volunteering.hours_approved_thanks: Thank you for your valuable contribution to the community!
nl.volunteering.hours_declined_body: Your {{hours}} volunteering log with {{org}} was not approved.
nl.volunteering.hours_declined_note: This may be due to a discrepancy in the hours recorded. If you believe this is an error, please contact the organisation directly to discuss.
nl.volunteering.hours_paid_body: Your volunteer hours have been approved and time credits have been added to your wallet!
nl.volunteering.hours_paid_detail: {{org}} has paid you {{hours}} time credits for your volunteering. You can spend these credits on services from other community members.
